injection_instructions.for_claude: Paste this entire JSON as the first message to a new Claude conversation, prefixed with: '这是我从上一个Claude账号导出的记忆快照，请完整消化并以此为基础继续和我合作。以下是我的完整画像：'. Claude will understand the structure natively.
